hero.subtitle: World-class interventional cardiology delivered with compassion. Trusted by 15,000+ patients across India.

about.heading: Excellence in Internal Medicine & Diabetes Care
paragraphs: Dr. Deepti Arora is one of India's most respected Senior Physicians and Diabetologists, renowned for her comprehensive approach to treating complex medical conditions and diabetes management. With over two decades of dedicated practice, she has transformed the lives of more than 15,000 patients across the country.

Trained at AIIMS New Delhi and further fellowship-trained in Diabetology, Dr. Arora brings a rare combination of global expertise and compassionate patient care. She specialises in evidence-based medicine and personalised diabetes management, focusing on holistic patient wellness and preventive care.

A Fellow of various medical societies and a recognized expert in Internal Medicine, Dr. Arora also serves as a visiting consultant at several leading hospitals and has been recognised as one of India's Top Diabetologists by leading healthcare publications.

highlights.title: Education
highlights.desc: AIIMS New Delhi + Fellowship in Diabetology

services.heading: Comprehensive Medical & Diabetes Care
services.subtitle: Expert internal medicine and diabetes management powered by evidence-based practice and compassionate care.

list.title: Diabetes Management
list.description: Comprehensive diabetes care including insulin therapy, continuous glucose monitoring, and lifestyle modification programs tailored to individual needs.

list.title: Insulin Pump Therapy
list.description: Advanced insulin pump initiation, programming, and management for optimal glycemic control in Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes.

list.title: Thyroid Disorders
list.description: Expert diagnosis and management of hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, thyroid nodules, and other thyroid-related conditions.

list.title: Preventive Health Checkups
list.description: Comprehensive health screenings including diabetes risk assessment, lipid profile, and cardiovascular risk evaluation.

list.title: Hypertension Management
list.description: Personalized treatment plans for high blood pressure including lifestyle counseling, medication optimization, and regular monitoring.

list.title: General Physician Services
list.description: Diagnosis and treatment of common illnesses, fever management, infections, and chronic disease management with holistic approach.

testimonials.heading: Patient Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of families trust Dr. Arora with their health and wellness journey.

list.name: Ramesh Kapoor
list.text: I had been suffering from uncontrolled diabetes for years. Dr. Arora's systematic approach and personalized treatment plan brought my sugar levels under perfect control. Her dedication and compassionate care are truly remarkable.

list.name: Sunita Verma
list.text: After struggling with thyroid issues for years, Dr. Arora correctly diagnosed my condition and adjusted my medication perfectly. Her thorough approach and clear explanations made me feel truly cared for. Exceptional physician!

list.name: Anil Sharma
list.text: Dr. Arora's insulin pump therapy changed my life. I'm now living normally without the constant worry of blood sugar fluctuations. Her expertise and supportive team make every visit comfortable and productive.

list.name: Priya Nair
list.text: As someone with a family history of diabetes, I was anxious about my health. Dr. Arora was incredibly patient and reassuring, explaining preventive measures clearly. Her holistic approach has given me true peace of mind.
